headline: D.R. Horton's Southwest Florida Division Announces Driftwood Bay, a New Home Community in Port Charlotte, Florida
summary: PORT CHARLOTTE, FLORIDA / ACCESS Newswire / March 4, 2026 / D.R. Horton's Southwest Florida Division, is excited to introduce Driftwood Bay, a thoughtfully designed new home community in Port Charlotte. Driftwood Bay brings attainable homeownership ...
